title: Restriction on the Start/Complete buttons of a release
excerpt: It’s important to restrict the ability to click the Start/Complete buttons to specific users, as they are sometimes triggered accidentally by others."

posts.author: SivanO (Sivan Orren)
posts.cookedHtml: It’s important to restrict the ability to click the Start/Complete buttons to specific users, as they are sometimes triggered accidentally by others."

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
You can change who can edit columns. Click on the three dots in the column header and then choose ‘SEttings/Restrict Column Editing’ .
